businessContext_i18n.fr: Composante de fréquence la plus élevée.

rules: All numeric inputs must be positive numbers.

hiddenLossDrivers: Low SLA indicates service reliability issue.

description.short: Calculate minimum sampling rate for biological signals (Nyquist theorem).
description.long: Calculate minimum sampling rate for biological signals (Nyquist theorem).

short_i18n.en: Calculate minimum sampling rate for biological signals (Nyquist theorem).
short_i18n.tr: Sinyalde ortusmeyi (aliasing) onleyen Minimum ADC Sampling Rateni Nyquist teoremi ile hesaplar.
short_i18n.de: Berechnen Sie die minimale Abtastrate fur biologische Signale (Nyquist-Theorem).
short_i18n.fr: Calculer la fréquence d'échantillonnage minimale pour les signaux biologiques (théorème de Nyquist).
short_i18n.es: Calcular la tasa de muestreo mínima para señales biológicas (teorema de Nyquist).
short_i18n.ar: احسب الحد الأدنى لمعدل أخذ العينات للإشارات البيولوجية (نظرية نيكويست).
